component.name: Action Tile
component.description: Compact square action for a grid: 40px circular accent well (semantic activity / session color) plus two-line uppercase label. Icons are instance/content—supply SVG or image in code; Figma uses exported vectors per Kind.

codeProps.kind: Maps to accent token + default line1/line2 (overridable).
codeProps.onClick: optional; renders as button when set.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Action Tile (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.label: action-tile-label

notes: 2026-03-28: Renamed Figma axis to `Kind` with human-readable variant values; former `Property 1=Default|Variant2…` removed.
2026-04-10: Renamed structural wrappers to kebab-case `action-tile-*` and mirrored them with `data-name` hooks in TSX.

2026-04-11: `COMPONENT_SET` vertical auto layout (16px gap). `clipsContent` cleared on `action-tile-icon-circle`, `action-tile-icon`, and `action-tile-label` frames. Variant internals remain absolute-positioned in Figma (icon above label); TSX uses column flex (icon then label).
START SESSION well uses Semantic/Status/Error/Text in Figma (rust); other kinds use Semantic/Activity/* tokens.
